signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: Crude oil prices surge on Iran war concerns — June WTI crude oil up +2.89. USD/JPY at 159.53; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry keeps the pair bid. Intervention risk on a break above 160.00 grows with rising geopolitical tensions. COT JPY net short −65,309 — unwind risk elevated.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs HV30 at 8.2% and ATM IV at 9.4%. 25d RR at −0.14 — mild put skew. Price at 0.7136; positioning stalling. Late-trend caution signal as market hedges rather than chases.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR weakest G8 currency this week: −0.411% (n=7 pairs). CAD leads at +0.310%. G8 spread: 0.721%. EUR underperformance vs CAD driven by geopolitics and carry — BoE 3.75% vs ECB 2% — 175bp GBP carry advantage.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral. GBP/USD at 1.3501; 1.3600 is next resistance. COT GBP net long +28,426; AM constructive. Market positioning aligned with carry read.
